_meta.title: Alpha Source Registry
_meta.purpose: Decompose every alpha-lab strategy/research-object into underlying ALPHA SOURCES. A strategy may hold several sources; several strategies may implement ONE source. The unit of independence is the (information source, mechanism, who-pays) triple, not the spec.

evidence_ladder.falsified: Tested and refuted; only NEW data reopens

class_defs.Market: Independent forecast of an asset's future return (a real edge over the market).
class_defs.Estimator: Better estimate of a quantity (covariance, mean) — improves a portfolio, does NOT forecast return.
class_defs.Portfolio: Combination/sizing of existing sources — Sharpe uplift from diversification/risk-budgeting, not a new forecast.
class_defs.Execution: Edge from HOW/WHEN orders are placed (timing, venue), not from what is forecast.

_meta.headline: The 4 promoted books reduce to ONE promoted market source (AS-01, vol-managed US large-cap equity premium) plus ONE portfolio object (AS-14, defensive_ensemble). vol_managed_qqq / vol_core_svxy / trend_vol_qqq are THREE IMPLEMENTATIONS of AS-01 (each adding a minor sleeve/overlay), not three independent forecasts.

sources.name: Volatility-managed US large-cap equity premium
sources.information_source: 21d trailing realized vol of the equity index + the persistent equity risk premium itself
sources.mechanism: Moreira-Muir (2017): realized vol is persistent but expected return is NOT proportionally higher in high-vol states, so scaling exposure by inverse variance (vol target ~0.25, cap 2x) raises Sharpe. This is levered equity-premium harvesting with a mild vol-timing kicker.
sources.who_pays: Long-run bearers of equity market risk (the premium); on the timing leg, investors who do not de-lever in high-vol regimes.
sources.forecast_target: Risk-adjusted return of a US large-cap equity index (QQQ/SPY); NOT the direction, the risk-scaling.
sources.evidence_note: 1y blind + 82-window WF (+13.4pp median excess, 78% beat-SPY, DSR 81.5%). CAPPED at 3: cross-market replication was RUN and FAILED (F-020, 3/7 clusters, p=0.77) — confirmed US-large-cap-equity-specific, level 4 refused.
factor_exposures: mild negative exposure in vol spikes
related_failures: NR-5 (sophistication does not add median return)
sources.forward_test_status: LIVE paper (all four books submit nightly, paper-only). Promoted. Pre-registered forward horizon required for level 5.
sources.notes: THE single promoted market source. vol_managed_qqq / vol_core_svxy / trend_vol_qqq are three implementations of THIS source, each bolting on one minor extra (VRP sleeve = AS-04, trend gate = AS-02). Their common load-bearing edge is identical.

sources.name: Time-series (trend) momentum
sources.information_source: Sign/level of own past return: 200d SMA (index gate) or 252d total-return sign (cross-asset)
sources.mechanism: Moskowitz-Ooi-Pedersen (2012): slow-moving capital + investor underreaction to news and subsequent herding sustain multi-month positive return autocorrelation.
sources.who_pays: Rebalancers and hedgers who trade against the trend (target-weight rebalancers, mean-reversion capital).
sources.forecast_target: Sign of next-period return of the asset it is applied to.
sources.horizon: monthly rebalance, 12-month lookback (index gate reacts faster via 200d SMA)
sources.evidence_note: Index-level trend gate reaches level 3 ONLY inside the vol-managed family as a tail hedge; F-014 shows trend+vol combined HALVES median excess (+8.0pp vs +13.4pp either parent) — a priced tail hedge, NOT additive alpha. Cross-asset tsmom is level 2 sleeve-only (WF -8.8pp median standalone). F-020: gate replicates in only 4/7 clusters (p=0.50).
sources.forward_test_status: LIVE paper inside trend_vol_qqq and defensive_ensemble. tsmom_multi_asset not independently live (sleeve-only).
sources.notes: Same mechanism whether applied to one index (gate) or many assets (tsmom) — ONE source, two universes. Not an independent additive forecast over AS-01 in US equities (F-014); its real value is crisis-alpha diversification inside the portfolio object AS-14.

sources.name: Dual (relative + absolute) cross-asset momentum
sources.information_source: 252d total return, ranked across SPY/QQQ/GLD + absolute momentum vs BIL; defensive leg momentum-picked TLT vs BIL
sources.mechanism: Antonacci dual momentum: relative-strength selection among risk assets + absolute-momentum crash gate (step aside when winner cannot beat cash). Rides the same TSMOM underreaction premium with a winner-take-all switch.
sources.who_pays: TSMOM counterparty (against-trend rebalancers) + mean-reversion capital; behavioral underreaction sustains it.
sources.forecast_target: Which single risk/defensive asset carries the next month.
sources.evidence_note: 5y blind pass (gold +29.1%, gem +17.9%) but discounted: gold-menu design was hindsight-tinted; WF +6.9pp median excess unremarkable. F-020 (defensive-asset): the gold third slot is a 2024-26 REGIME ARTIFACT (wins 13% of pre-2024 windows). F-012: the 12m gate protects against SLOW bears only.
sources.forward_test_status: LIVE paper, WATCH-tier — held for forward evidence only, forward test decides. Note: gem and gold currently hold an IDENTICAL position (both {QQQ:1.5}); real-time independence between the pair is ~0 at this instant.
sources.notes: NEAR-DUPLICATE of AS-02: same underreaction/momentum premium and who-pays; the differences are the relative-strength selection among a few assets and the winner-take-all construction. Counts as its own IMPLEMENTATION FAMILY but NOT a mechanistically independent source from trend momentum.

sources.name: Variance risk premium (short-vol carry)
sources.information_source: VIX level vs realized vol (VIX vs 63d median; VIX vs 25 & 10d RV)
sources.mechanism: Implied vol systematically exceeds subsequently-realized vol, so selling variance (SVXY / inverse-VIX) earns a carry; sellers of variance insurance get paid for warehousing tail risk.
sources.who_pays: Buyers of tail/variance insurance (hedgers, structured-product desks) who overpay for downside protection.
sources.forecast_target: Realized minus implied variance over the coming weeks.
sources.evidence_note: svxy_vix_carry FAILED both blinds (F-007: 1y +5.9%, 5y +3.1%); daily-close gates cannot dodge the Aug-2024 / Apr-2025 gap events; post-2018 SVXY at -0.5x halves the carry. Survives ONLY as a small gated sleeve inside a vol-managed core.
factor_exposures: correlated with equity beta in crashes
sources.forward_test_status: LIVE paper only as the SVXY sleeve inside vol_core_svxy; standalone RETIRED.
sources.notes: Genuinely distinct source (VRP, not equity premium) but tradable here only as a capacity- and gap-limited sleeve — it is why vol_core_svxy scores complexity 3 / capacity 3 vs vol_managed_qqq's 5/5.

sources.name: Cross-sectional stock momentum (12-1, large caps)
sources.information_source: 12-1 month stock returns, cross-sectionally ranked within the S&P 500
sources.mechanism: Underreaction to firm-level information → winners keep winning (Jegadeesh-Titman).
sources.who_pays: (would be) the anchoring crowd — but no edge is present to be paid.
sources.forecast_target: Cross-sectional rank of next-month stock returns.
sources.evidence_note: DEAD in this universe/era. Monthly rank IC vs 21d fwd = -0.001 (t=-0.07, 135 months); sector-relative / residual / 52w-high variants all ~0 and 0.97-correlated with raw (F-016 addendum). The +16.6% 1y-blind excess was a regime draw; WF -4.6pp median excess (F-015). momentum_concentrated's tolerable windows came from CONSTRUCTION (concentration + vol targeting), not selection skill.
implementation_books: momentum_concentrated (watch-tier, live paper — SIGNAL dead, held only to observe construction)
sources.forward_test_status: LIVE paper WATCH-tier, but the underlying SIGNAL is falsified — kept only to see whether rank IC returns in live monitoring.
sources.notes: A genuinely distinct market source that was TESTED AND FALSIFIED. Reopen only on a different universe (small caps) or interaction conditioning (momentum x dispersion / x earnings).

sources.name: Post-earnings / post-shock underreaction drift (PEAD proxy)
sources.information_source: 1d return >= 2.5 trailing-60d sigmas confirmed by volume >= 3x 20d median (a FREE-DATA proxy for an earnings surprise)
sources.mechanism: Investors anchor on pre-announcement expectations and update slowly, so a large positive surprise keeps paying for ~60 trading days.
sources.who_pays: The anchoring crowd + passive/index flow that ignores firm-level news; fast money will not warehouse 60d single-name event risk.
sources.evidence_note: 1y blind +5.8% beta-matched excess PASS, but 5y CAGR decayed to +12.3% and WF worst window -53.4% (F-009). CRITICAL: the proxy fires ~1/day and catches NON-earnings shocks; the real hypothesis 'drift after REAL earnings surprises' was NEVER tested — no point-in-time earnings/analyst data exists in the repo.
factor_exposures: long equity beta (idle capital parked in SPY)
sources.forward_test_status: WATCH. ic-earnings-fwd experiment ACCUMULATING forward-only PIT earnings from 2026-07-10 (kill IC<0.01 or t<1 at n>=600).
sources.notes: Distinct source; the proxy is a stand-in. True PEAD is effectively level 0-1 (literature prior only) until PIT earnings data accrues.

sources.name: Short-term reversal (large caps, daily)
sources.information_source: 5d / 21d stock returns (and OU half-life, s-score, deep-dip dislocation variants)
sources.mechanism: Overreaction / liquidity-provision reversal: recent losers bounce, winners give back.
sources.who_pays: Liquidity demanders paying the liquidity provider.
sources.evidence_note: Gross is real (5d decile spread +15.8%/yr, t=2.41) but TURNOVER eats it: best long-only nets below SPY, market-neutral nets negative. Four independent designs, four deaths (NR-1: F-001 decile, F-003 OU half-life screens the WRONG trades, F-004 Avellaneda-Lee gross-up/net-worse, F-008 deep-dip concentration). F-017 IC ~0.
sources.forward_test_status: RETIRED. Reopen only if measured live slippage <= 2-3 bps/side or intraday execution becomes available.
sources.notes: STRONG against (four mechanisms, one verdict). Do not run a fifth daily-bar reversal variant at 10 bps/side. The one untested angle is vol-conditioned entry timing.

sources.name: Low-volatility / low-beta anomaly (as a ranking signal)
sources.information_source: 60d total vol / 60d sector-residual idiosyncratic vol, cross-sectionally ranked
sources.mechanism: Leverage-constrained investors bid up high-beta names, so low-vol/low-beta earns higher risk-adjusted returns (Frazzini-Pedersen BAB).
sources.who_pays: Leverage-constrained / benchmark-chasing investors overpaying for high-beta.
sources.forecast_target: Cross-sectional rank of next-month risk-adjusted returns.
sources.evidence_note: DEAD as a large-cap ranking signal: 60d total vol low-minus-high mean IC -0.006 (t=-0.29); sector-residual ivol +0.002 (t=0.16); strongly negative in 2025 (F-018). NOTE: the min-var books (pca_minvar) are ESTIMATOR objects (AS-13), not this ranking bet.
implementation_books: (none directly; low-vol shows up only via min-var construction AS-13)
sources.forward_test_status: RETIRED as a ranking signal. Reopen on vol-anomaly conditioning (post-drawdown regimes) or a universe with a real vol spread.
sources.notes: Distinct source, falsified as selection. Any low-vol edge that remains is a variance-ESTIMATION improvement, not a return forecast — see AS-13.

sources.name: Overnight / close-to-close premium
sources.mechanism: The equity premium accrues disproportionately overnight (~9%/yr of 13.1% total).
sources.who_pays: n/a — the premium is real but not harvestable as a cross-sectional tilt at the current execution convention.
sources.evidence_note: Real premium, but a 126d overnight-share tilt has ZERO cross-sectional predictive power close-to-close (t=-0.15; F-006). F-019 confirms overnight-share ranks nothing at monthly horizon.
sources.forward_test_status: DORMANT. EXPLICITLY REOPENED by design when the harness gains open+close execution — the effect is real, the constraint is the convention. Execution-dependent (see AS-15).
sources.notes: A market fact that only becomes a source with an EXECUTION change; today it yields no independent tradable forecast.

sources.name: Participation-breadth regime timing
sources.information_source: RSP/SPY 63d relative return (equal- vs cap-weight breadth)
sources.mechanism: Broad participation signals a healthy regime worth levering; narrow breadth signals fragility.
sources.who_pays: n/a — no robust edge; effectively a static-leverage timing overlay.
sources.forecast_target: Regime (lever up 2x vs de-risk to vol-managed).
sources.evidence_note: breadth_gated_leverage: 1y pass on beta but WF worst -44.5%, param-fragile; killed with the static-leverage pattern (F-011).
sources.notes: Weak/retired; mostly a repackaging of levered beta (NR-4). Leverage must be state-dependent (vol), not breadth-gated.

sources.name: Post-panic recovery drift (VIX-spike mean-reversion add)
sources.mechanism: Volatility spikes mean-revert, so adding leverage into a panic captures the recovery.
sources.evidence_note: vix_panic_buyer: WF worst 12m -62.1% (GFC — adding leverage into 2008's serial VIX spikes was catastrophic). Blind windows simply contained no cascade (F-013).
sources.forward_test_status: RETIRED as an unconditional overlay. Reopen only with a regime guard whose worst walk-forward window (incl. 2008) is > -30%, pre-registered, not tuned on the GFC window that killed it.
sources.notes: Distinct source, falsified. A cousin of AS-04 (both short-vol) but the mechanism claim (spikes mean-revert -> lever in) is the dangerous part.

sources.name: Price/volume microstructure ranking (volume shock, gap persistence)
sources.information_source: Volume shock 21d/252d; 63d count of held >2 sigma up-gaps
sources.mechanism: Abnormal volume / gap persistence proxies informed flow that predicts continuation.
sources.evidence_note: Volume shock (t=0.13/-0.43), gap-count persistence (t=0.25/0.52) — flat in every half-decade (F-019).
sources.forward_test_status: RETIRED at monthly horizon. Plausibly intraday/weekly effects; reopen only with a higher-frequency harness.
sources.notes: Screened and falsified at monthly sampling; grouped with the F-017/018/019 IC-screen deaths.

sources.name: Dispersion-bias-corrected covariance estimation (JSE/psi-hat PCA) for min-var
sources.information_source: NO new market information — same return panel; the edge is a better covariance eigenstructure (Goldberg/James-Stein-style shrinkage of PCA eigenvectors).
sources.mechanism: At short windows / weak factors, sample PCA eigenvectors are dispersion-biased; the psi-hat rotation corrects them, lowering realized min-var portfolio vol.
sources.who_pays: Nobody — this is NOT a forecast of returns. It improves the risk estimate of a given long-only min-var portfolio.
sources.evidence_note: F-021 RESOLVED: JSE is DEAD at n=252 and unconstrained (+14 to +31 bps vol, t~8-12, worse than raw), ALIVE at small n long-only (n=63: -2.0 bps at k=3, t=-6.0; crossover map: helps at every n in long-only, benefit -0.24 bps per unit p/n). The publishable claim is the BOUNDARY, not a headline return. At k=1 long-only the delta is ~noise (F-010).
factor_exposures: min-variance / low-vol construction tilt (the portfolio's, not the estimator's)
sources.forward_test_status: Research object, not a live paper book. Matched pair (raw vs JSE) is the estimator program's spine. Deployable rule: JSE always-on in long-only, never unconstrained.
sources.notes: MUST NOT be counted as a market source. An estimator improvement (1-2 bps vol) is NOT an independent market forecast. Competing estimators (MP-clipping best unconstrained, LW second) are the same class.

sources.name: Diversified-premia combination (defensive_ensemble)
sources.information_source: The sleeve returns of AS-01, AS-02, AS-03 and their low pairwise correlation.
sources.mechanism: Combine three premia that survive on different return sources at equal risk / inverse-vol, vol-targeted to ~18%; the ensemble Sharpe exceeds any single sleeve's because the sleeves are near-uncorrelated (esp. across bear years). Sizing is portfolio construction, not a new forecast.
sources.who_pays: n/a — the 'alpha' is a diversification/risk-budgeting uplift, not a counterparty payment.
sources.forecast_target: Portfolio Sharpe / drawdown, not any single asset's return.
sources.evidence_note: 5y blind pass + WF role-confirm as CAPITAL PRESERVER: 84% positive windows, worst -18.3%, DSR 95.8%, flat 2022. But value-vs-naive only +1.4pp median excess — the value lives in the drawdown column, not in return (a capital preserver, not an 18% machine).
factor_exposures: blended: managed equity beta (sleeve A) + cross-asset trend/crisis-alpha (sleeve B) + regime-switch momentum (sleeve C)
related_failures: falsifier: sleeve pairwise corr > 0.7 in a stress quarter
sources.forward_test_status: LIVE paper, promoted (portfolio sleeve). Watch the sleeve-correlation falsifier.
sources.notes: NOT an independent market source — it is a PORTFOLIO object over sources it already holds. Its independence is real at the RISK level (diversification), not at the FORECAST level.

sources.name: Execution alpha (open+close / intraday timing)
sources.information_source: Order timing/venue, not a return forecast.
sources.mechanism: Placing the same target at a better time (overnight vs intraday, intraday reversal windows) reduces cost or unlocks an effect the daily-close convention hides.
sources.forecast_target: Realized slippage / fill quality; and unlocking AS-07 (reversal) and AS-09 (overnight) which are execution-gated.
sources.evidence_note: No execution alpha claimed. The ops-reality harness MEASURES execution drag (thresholds: [0,15] bps stocks / [0,5] bps ETFs, reject rate <2%/night, tracking drag <30 bps/month) but does not yet HARVEST an edge. Two reopen hooks depend on it: F-001 (reversal at <=2-3 bps/side) and F-006 (overnight tilt with open+close execution).
sources.forward_test_status: ACCUMULATING measurement in ledgers/hunt2026/_reconcile.jsonl; zero harvested execution sources.
sources.notes: Placeholder class with zero current sources but two live reopen conditions. An execution improvement is NOT a market forecast.
